$PYPL Every ounce of my bones says we get a higher bid sooner rather than later.

Stripe absolutely wants to be a powerhouse not just in the processing/transaction sector but also banking/fintech with the Paypal/Venmo synergy.

I believe.

Big W for Stripe, but big L for Painpal…

Close the doors, I will tell you how to make money on AI stocks in this market.   

Buy when others are capitulating like last Thurs/ Fri. Sell when they think we are back again.   

Sell into descending moving averages and once in  decent profit, stops up to break even. Don't chase strength until charts look more constructive, will take time. 

Keep stops tight.
